seoTitle: Taromeo vs Tarong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Taromeo and Tarong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Taromeo and Tarong.
heading: Taromeo vs Tarong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taromeo, Queensland and Tarong, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarong has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Taromeo (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taromeo or Tarong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taromeo has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Tarong scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taromeo scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Tarong scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taromeo or Tarong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
